title: Legacy Plugin Config Doctor 2026.5.22
objective: A plugin config containing stale install index data and bundled plugin load paths, used to verify Doctor does not reintroduce plugin load-path loops and leaves plugins list/gateway startup clean.

setup.title: Write Legacy Plugin Config
setup.intent: Create stale plugin install metadata and bundled plugin load paths tied to recent plugin Doctor regressions.
evidence: doctor upgrade evidence names issue #85334 and PR #85358

setupEvidence: config/kova-doctor-upgrade-evidence.json lists issue #85334, PR #85358, and PR #85170 as breakage evidence
.openclaw/openclaw.json contains legacy plugins.load.paths pointing at bundled plugin directories
plugins/installs.json uses an older install-index shape
cleanupGuarantees: disposable env cleanup removes legacy plugin config fixture files
